name: LoRA Fine-Tuning
description: Parameter-efficient LoRA fine-tuning workflow for adapter training with low VRAM footprint.

params.script:
import json, os, torch

base_model = os.getenv('BASE_MODEL', 'mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2')
rank = int(os.getenv('ADAPTER_RANK', '16'))
device = 'cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu'

# Runtime-safe dry-run scaffold; full adapter training can mount dataset + trainer entrypoint
adapter_params = rank * 4096
print('DC1_RESULT_JSON:' + json.dumps({
  'template': 'lora-finetune',
  'base_model': base_model,
  'adapter_rank': rank,
  'estimated_adapter_params': adapter_params,
  'device': device,
  'status': 'ready_for_dataset'
}))

model_cache.behavior: Warm cache reuses base model checkpoints while writing LoRA adapters to output/checkpoint mounts.
